Description: Most recent annualized NOI (per Field 12 definition) as of report date serving as primary source of repayment.
Allowable Values: Refer to Field 12 for allowable values.

Description: Date for the value provided in Field 40.
Allowable Values: yyyy-mm-dd. Must be <= report date. May be blank if Field 40 is NA.

Description: Most recent property value from appraisal or evaluation (12 CFR 34). If most recent = Field 13, report Field 13 amount. Prorated for ownership interest. Sum for multiple/cross-collateralized properties.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar signs, commas, or decimals.

Description: Date of most recent valuation in Field 42.

LoanNumbers (Field 1) for all cross-collateralized loans. Includes loans < $1M. Single loan with multiple properties is NOT cross-collateralized. Only loans sharing properties in collateral pool. Must have CRE collection entry.
Allowable Values: Comma-separated LoanNumbers. Blank if not cross-collateralized.

Description: Value of cash and marketable securities pledged as collateral where bank has first perfected security interest.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar signs, commas, or decimals.

Mandatory/Optional: 49,Troubled Debt Restructuring,TroubledDebtRestructuring,,Whether loan has been restructured in TDR per FR Y-9C Glossary."

Field Name: Lower of Cost or Market Flag
Description: Whether loan is under FVO, HFS at LOCOM, or neither (NA).
If in SNC and reporting entity is lead bank/agent (option 5 in Field 7), report Internal Credit ID from SNC collection. Otherwise NA.
Allowable Values: No carriage return, line feed, comma, or unprintable characters. NA if not in SNC or not agent.

Description: Date of most recent renewal if credit facility renewed/re-priced/maturity changed without changing Origination Date. Major modification = 9999-12-31. Not renewed = 9999-12-31.
Currency denomination for contractual principal and interest payments (ISO 4217). Predominant currency if multiple permitted. All other field amounts must be in USD.
Date on which most recent occupancy level (Field 23) was determined by borrower.
Allowable Values: yyyy-mm-dd. Must be <= report date. May be blank if Field 23 is NA.

Description: Whether Current Value (Field 42) was calculated as is, as stabilized, or as completed per SR10-16.
Whether credit facility has prepayment penalty clause in effect (may include yield maintenance).
